features: 【High-Quality Foam Material】: Pipe Insulation for Utensil Tools is made from premium foam material that is safe, non-toxic, and designed for durability. It is tested to endure daily, constant use. It has the feature of shock-absorbing packaging, anti-scratch, anti-collision protection, moisture-proof insulation.

【Comfortable Grip】: With its soft but sturdy material, it provides a comfortable hand feeling. It is soft enough for a comfortable grip but firm enough for consistent use, offering the perfect balance between comfort and durability.

【Versatile Usage】: The foam tube you received is suitable as a buffer and shock-proof protection cotton tube, The product has a wide range of applications. It is perfect for items with small handles like utensils, pens, pencils, toothbrushes, razors, and more. Its versatility makes it a valuable addition to any household item.

【Helper for All】: This Foam Tube Sponge Protective Sleeve is not just a common household item; it can also serve as an aid for those struggling with grip, control, or coordination issues. It can be used in occupational therapy or physical therapy for both adults and children, helping them improve their motor skills.

【Non-Slip and Easy-to-Clean】: The Self Seal Pipe Insulation is designed to prevent slips and falls during usage. It has a non-absorbent surface making it easy to clean. You don’t have to worry about it retaining water or growing bacteria.The insulation pipe can be installed directly on the pipe, which is convenient for cutting and pasting, which can greatly save manual labor.
